title: Brazilian Tagine with Tropical Peas
description: A flavorful and nutritious tagine made with tropical fruits and peas, inspired by Brazilian cuisine. This dish is gluten-free and perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: tropical fruit (such as pineapple or mango)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the peas and tropical fruit, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
